com.runticket.model.Event

Package
Description
com.runticket.model
Models for the RunTicket application.
com.runticket.service
Services for the RunTicket application.
com.runticket.view
Views for the RunTicket application.

  • Uses of Event in com.runticket.model

    Subclasses of Event in com.runticket.model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Concert
    The Concert class represents a concert event and extends the Event class.
    class 
    Festival
    The Festival class represents a festival event and extends the Event class.
    class 
    Sport
    The Sport class represents a sport event, inheriting from the Event class.

  • Uses of Event in com.runticket.service

    Method parameters in com.runticket.service with type arguments of type Event
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PurchaseTickets.buyTickets(ConcurrentHashMap<Integer,Event> eventList, ConcurrentHashMap<String,Customer> customerList, String customerUsername)
    Method to facilitate the ticket purchasing process for a customer
    void
    PurchaseTickets.cancelOrder(ConcurrentHashMap<Integer,Event> eventList, ConcurrentHashMap<String,Customer> customerList, String customerUsername)
    Method to facilitate the order cancellation process for a customer It refunds the customer (excluding fees) and updates the event and customer records accordingly.
    void
    CustomerListStrategy.extractEventData(File fileIn, Map<Integer,Event> mapIn, Map<String,Venue> venueListIn)
    Extracts event data - not applicable for this strategy and so it won't do anything but display a message that says that it cannot extract Event Data.
    void
    EventListStrategy.extractEventData(File fileIn, Map<Integer,Event> scanEventList, Map<String,Venue> venueListIn)
    Extracts event data from a file and populates the event and venue lists.
    void
    FileParsingContext.extractEventData(File fileIn, Map<Integer,Event> mapIn, Map<String,Venue> venueListIn)
    Extracts event data from a file using the current parsing strategy
    void
    FileParsingStrategy.extractEventData(File fileIn, Map<Integer,Event> eventMapIn, Map<String,Venue> venueListIn)
    Extracts event data from a file
    void
    UpdateDataStrategy.extractEventData(File fileIn, Map<Integer,Event> mapIn, Map<String,Venue> venueListIn)
    Won't do anything since this strategy only updates data,

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SwingView.displayEventAddedConfirmation(Event event)
    Displays a confirmation message and the event details after successfully adding an event
    void
    SwingView.displayEventCancellationResults(Event event, int refundCount, double totalRefunded)
    Displays event cancellation results
    void
    SwingView.displayEventDetailsWithCapacity(Event event)
    Displays detailed information about a specific event in the details panel, including seat availability.
    void
    SwingView.displayEventFees(Event event)
    Displays fee information for a specific event
    void
    ConsoleView.displayEventRevenue(Event event)
    Displays event revenue information.
    void
    SwingView.displayEventRevenue(Event event)
    Displays detailed revenue report for a specific event in the details panel.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ConsoleView.displayAvailableEvents(HashMap<Integer,Event> eventList)
    Displays available events.
    void
    SwingView.displayAvailableEvents(ConcurrentHashMap<Integer,Event> eventList)
